get.description: Checks the IP against multiple DNSBL lists; data is a homogeneous array of hits.
Resolves DNS records (A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME, SOA) for a domain.
Compares DNS answers across public resolvers (Google, Cloudflare, Quad9).
Returns the caller's IP address and scope (public/private/loopback).
Returns the caller IP address as plain text (curl-friendly).
Geo, ASN, ISP and reverse DNS for an IP address.
Geolocation for an IP address.
ASN and organization for an IP address.
PTR reverse DNS hostname for an IP address.

post.description: Runs an external geo/ASN lookup for the given IP and stores the result.
Records the caller public IP for the authenticated user and sends push when it changes.

get.description: Returns cached lookup records as a homogeneous list in data.
Returns a single lookup record by id.
Returns all IP notes for the authenticated user as a homogeneous list in data.
Returns a single IP note by id.

delete.description: Deletes an IP note by id.

get.description: VPN/proxy/hosting/mobile flags for an IP (from lookup provider).
IPv4 CIDR calculator (network, broadcast, usable hosts).
TCP connect check for host/IP and port.
TLS certificate summary for a domain and port.

post.description: Convert between dotted IPv4, UInt32, and compressed IPv6.
Registers or updates an FCM/APNs device token for the authenticated user.
Removes a device token for the authenticated user (e.g. on logout).
Authenticates a user. Use ?useCookies=true for cookie-based authentication.
Returns a new access token using a valid refresh token.

get.description: Confirms a user's email address using the token sent by email.

post.description: Sends a new email confirmation link to the specified address.
Sends a password reset link to the specified email address.
Resets a user's password using the token sent by email.
Enables, disables, or retrieves two-factor authentication settings.

get.description: Returns the current user's email and two-factor authentication status.

post.description: Updates the current user's email or password.
Logs out the current user by clearing the authentication cookie.

get.description: RDAP/WHOIS registration data for an IP address.
RDAP/WHOIS registration data for a domain name.
